channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Krispy Kreme: 4th of July: $2.50 Original Glazed Dozen Add-On (Last Day!)
item.guid: Krispy Kreme-4th of July: $2.50 Original Glazed Dozen-2026-07-05
item.description: Use code USA online or in-app to add an Original Glazed dozen for just $2.50 with any dozen purchase — America's 250th birthday special ends today. (July 5 only)

item.title: Starbucks: 4th of July Firework Frappuccino
item.description: Limited-edition red, white & blue layered Firework Frappuccino with strawberry purée, pearls, and vanilla sweet cream — a holiday-exclusive drink through July 7. (Through July 7)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: Loco Rewards App: Exclusive In-App Boosts & Deals
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-Loco Rewards App: Exclusive In-App Boost-2026-07-05
item.description: Download the Loco Rewards app for exclusive in-app Boosts and offers on fire-grilled chicken bowls, salads, and more — healthy drive-thru dining year-round. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: America $2.50 Menu — 4th of July Special
item.description: Snag the Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, or Red, White & Blue Slush Float for just $2.50 each through July 12. (Through July 12)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza Any Crust $9.99 — Parmesan Stuffed Crust Included
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza Any Crust $9.99 — Parmesan Stu-2026-07-05
item.description: Order any pizza with any crust and up to 7 toppings for $9.99 online or in-app — Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge through July 26. (Through July 26)

item.title: KFC: Finger Lickin' Fourth: 12-Piece Bucket for $15
item.description: Grab a 12-piece Original or Extra Crispy chicken bucket for $15 as part of KFC's Finger Lickin' Fourth promotion through July 11. (Through July 11)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $2.50 Stars & Stripes Misty Slush Float — Last Day!
item.guid: Dairy Queen-$2.50 Stars & Stripes Misty Slush Fl-2026-07-05
item.description: Celebrate Independence Day weekend with a cherry and blue raspberry patriotic Misty Slush Float topped with soft-serve for $2.50 — final day today. (July 5 only)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $6.99 MyHut Box — Entree + Side
item.guid: Pizza Hut-$6.99 MyHut Box — Entree + Side-2026-07-05
item.description: MyHut Box gets you an entree and side starting at $6.99 via the Pizza Hut app or online at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: McDonald's: Free Medium Fries Every Friday ($1 min. purchase)
item.guid: McDonald's-Free Medium Fries Every Friday ($1 min. -2026-07-05
item.description: Every Friday, order through the McDonald's app with any $1+ purchase and add a free medium fries — a recurring weekly app perk. (Every Friday)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 McValue Meal Deal
item.description: Bundle a sandwich, small fries, small drink, and 4-piece Chicken McNuggets for $5 via the McDonald's app at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: Free 6-Piece Nuggets Every Wednesday ($5+ purchase)
item.description: Every Wednesday, get a free 6-piece chicken nuggets with a $5+ purchase via the Wendy's app — a recurring weekly reward for app users. (Every Wednesday)

item.title: Wendy's: Free Fries Every Friday ($5+ purchase)
item.description: Every Friday in the Wendy's app, get free fries with any $5+ purchase — a reliable weekly perk for rewards members. (Every Friday)

item.title: Taco Bell: 3 Snack Tacos for $2.49 — Taco Tuesday Drop
item.guid: Taco Bell-3 Snack Tacos for $2.49 — Taco Tuesday D-2026-07-05
item.description: Every Tuesday from 3–11 PM, Taco Bell app users can score three Snack Tacos starting at $2.49 — a recurring weekly digital deal. (Every Tuesday 3–11 PM)

item.title: Taco Bell: 3 Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.59 — Thursday Drop
item.guid: Taco Bell-3 Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.59 — Thur-2026-07-05
item.description: Every Thursday from 3–11 PM, Taco Bell app users can grab three Grilled Chicken Tacos starting at $3.59 — a lean protein pick at a recurring low price. (Every Thursday 3–11 PM)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders (Roast Beef, Chicken, Buffalo, Ham)
item.description: Arby's is offering any Slider — roast beef, chicken, buffalo chicken, or ham — for just $1.99 each at participating locations, each packed with 10–11g protein. (Limited time)

item.title: Dunkin': 4th of July Patriotic Menu — Dazzleberry Coolatta & More
item.guid: Dunkin'-4th of July Patriotic Menu — Dazzleberry-2026-07-05
item.description: Dunkin' rolled out a limited America 250 menu featuring the Strawberry Sparkler Cloud Latte, Dazzleberry Coolatta, Starlight Lemonade, Rocket Pop Donut, and Stars & Stripes Munchkins. (Limited time)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: Loco Rewards: Free Chips & Salsa App Exclusive
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-Loco Rewards: Free Chips & Salsa App-2026-07-05
item.description: Loco Rewards app members unlock exclusive in-app codes for free chips and salsa with any purchase — healthy drive-thru fire-grilled chicken for less. (Ongoing)
